title: Long-Looked-For Comes At Last.
content:
Though long it be, years may repay the debt;
    None loseth that which he in time may get.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Long-Looked-For Comes At Last."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
